title: rhododendron × variolosum
intro: Rhododendron × variolosum, also known as the variable-leaf rhododendron, is a hybrid plant species within the Rhododendron genus, known for its distinctive leaves and flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to soothe skin irritations, wounds, and reduce fever. The medicinal properties of Rhododendron × variolosum have been found to provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Rhododendron × variolosum is often prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety as a treatment for various health conditions.
